title: Hewn
description: A growing collection of medieval-inspired building blocks, starting with connected wattle and daub. Perfect for rustic and historical builds.
body:
Hewn is a medieval-inspired building mod designed for creators who crave authentic detail and customization in their builds. Starting with wattle & daub, Hewn introduces connected textures, pattern variations, and creative building tools for more control than ever before. Perfect for rustic houses, historical villages, and immersive RPG builds, Hewn focuses on quality over quantity, giving each block the attention it deserves. ## Current Features ✔ Wattle & Daub Blocks - Create classic medieval walls with seamless connected textures for a natural look. ## Screenshots ### Feature Showcase Seamless Walls: Connected textures create smooth, continuous patterns.
(todo: simple wall showing CTM in action) Wall Tool in Action: Switch patterns without breaking blocks.
(todo: cycling textures using Wall Tool) CTM Grouping: Two pattern groups side by side for advanced designs.
(todo: wall showing both CTM groups) ### Inspiration Builds Rustic Home: Perfect for medieval villages and historical towns.
(todo: small house featuring wattle & daub) Medieval Street: Showcasing variety and depth in larger builds.
(todo: row of buildings with varied textures) ## Planned Features ⚒ More wattle & daub variations ⚒ Placeable shields ⚒ Additional medieval construction materials ## Dependencies [Fusion (Connected Textures)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures)
